name: claw-copilot
description: Run-aware observability dashboard plugin for OpenClaw

scripts.build: cd dashboard && npm install && npm run build && cd .. && npm install && npm rebuild @vscode/sqlite3 && tsup --config tsup.config.ts && rm -rf dist/dashboard && cp -R dashboard/dist dist/dashboard && mkdir -p dist/node_modules/@vscode && cp -R node_modules/@vscode/sqlite3 dist/node_modules/@vscode/
